view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of joining a waitlist for a fully booked day, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the outcome of this specific scenario. While the linked use case outlines the waitlist process, it does not include any deterministic results or traces from the simulation of the persona scenario. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a clear outcome or failure report as required.
